text: An airplane comes in to land over a road full of cars
An elephant with tusks swims in the water with a sunset in the background.
The red light of a stop light showing through the dark.
A man who is putting on a tie.
A piece of chocolate cake topped with whipped cream and chocolate.
A bunch of umbellas sitting on a beach, during the day.
Large polar bear laying down on a set of rocks.
A train at a covered station with litter on the track.
A dog sitting on a teddy bear with an innocent look on its face.
Zebras standing together on a rock covered hill.
